magnetization.configuration.title: Magnetization Config
magnetization.configuration.physics.tool: Tunable physics constants for the Sable sub-level query and the entity force application path.
magnetization.configuration.physics.stre: Multiplier applied to every emitter's tier force value. 1.0 = default. Set globally up or down to tune feel without editing each emitter.
magnetization.configuration.physics.enti: Scale factor for converting impulse units to vanilla entity delta-movement per tick. Default 1/20 = 0.05.
magnetization.configuration.physics.coni: Cosine of the half-angle of conical emitters (Repulsor Coil). Larger value = narrower cone. cos(45°) = 0.7071.
magnetization.configuration.physics.maxA: Per-ship acceleration cap (m/s²) applied after Sable's mass scaling. Stops a STRONG emitter from launching a 1-block test ship across the world. 50 m/s² ≈ 5 g. Set to 0 to disable.
magnetization.configuration.guiLimits.to: Admin caps on what each emitter's in-game GUI can dial up to. Prevents griefer-tier loadouts on shared servers.
magnetization.configuration.guiLimits.el: Highest strength tier an Electromagnet's GUI can select.
Highest range (blocks) an Electromagnet's GUI can dial up to.
magnetization.configuration.guiLimits.an: Highest strength tier a Magnetic Anchor's GUI can select.
Highest range (blocks) a Magnetic Anchor's GUI can dial up to.
magnetization.configuration.guiLimits.re: Highest strength tier a Repulsor Coil's GUI can select.
Highest range (blocks) a Repulsor Coil's GUI can dial up to.
magnetization.configuration.guiLimits.tr: Highest strength tier a Tractor Beam's GUI can select.
Highest range (blocks) a Tractor Beam's GUI can dial up to.
magnetization.configuration.guiLimits.ex: Highest strength tier an Excavator's GUI can select. Strength controls pull force and tunneling speed per in-flight ship.
Highest column depth (blocks) an Excavator may rip ores from. EXTREME-tier reaches bedrock from surface with a 6× tier multiplier (~192 blocks).
Hard cap on cells the Excavator's cone scan considers per pass. Safety against config typos.
Maximum ferromagnetic blocks one Magnetic Excavator may pull simultaneously. Each pulled block is a Sable sub-level, so this also caps physics-simulation cost.
magnetization.configuration.content.tool: Soft-disable individual blocks or items. Existing placements stay on the map but become inert; disabled entries are hidden from the creative tab.
magnetization.configuration.content.disa: Magnetization block paths to disable (e.g. "repulsor_coil"). Disabled blocks emit no field, are hidden from the creative tab, and skip their right-click GUI.
Magnetization item paths to disable (e.g. "magnetic_grapple"). Disabled items are hidden from the creative tab and their special effects skip.
magnetization.configuration.items.toolti: Cooldowns, ranges, and other knobs for the Magnetic Grapple and Field Compass items.
magnetization.configuration.items.grappl: Game ticks between Magnetic Grapple right-clicks. 20 = 1 second.
Maximum scan range (blocks) the Grapple uses to find an attractive emitter.
magnetization.configuration.items.compas: Scan radius (blocks) the Field Compass uses to list active fields.
magnetization.configuration.worldgen.too: Optional flavor passes layered on top of standard worldgen. The base magnetite ore vein always generates in every overworld biome regardless of these flags.
magnetization.configuration.worldgen.mag: If true, denser magnetite ore veins appear in mountain biomes (#minecraft:is_mountain).
magnetization.configuration.worldgen.ano: If true, the Magnetic Anomaly biome spawns naturally and its runtime effects activate inside it (compass spin, 1.5× emitter strength, chaos field). Off = biome resource still loads (so /locate biome + /magnetization tp work) but it won't spawn naturally and effects stay inert.
Multiplier on the anomaly's chaos-field impulses (ships, players, items). 1.0 = default, 0 disables the chaos field while leaving compass spin + emitter bonus intact, higher values amplify.
magnetization.configuration.worldgen.pet: If true, the Petrified Forest biome registers a TerraBlender region so it spawns naturally (a cold/dry inland slot). Off = no natural generation; /locate biome and /magnetization tp petrified_forest still work.
magnetization.configuration.lightning.to: Lightning-Induced Remnant Magnetism (LIRM). Real-world phenomenon — a lightning strike's transient field stamps polarity onto nearby ferromagnetic material.
magnetization.configuration.lightning.li: If true, every lightning bolt magnetizes one unstamped metal armor/tool piece on the struck entity and has a high chance of converting nearby log blocks to petrified wood.
magnetization.configuration.tools.toolti: Per-tool signature abilities for magnetized tools. The shared 'pull dropped items' behavior still runs regardless of these toggles.
magnetization.configuration.tools.swordY: Magnetized swords yank opposite-pole armored targets one step toward the attacker on hit, on top of the Magnetized effect.
magnetization.configuration.tools.pickax: Sneaking with a magnetized pickaxe rips nearby ferromagnetic ore blocks out of the world as items, periodically.
Block radius scanned around the player for ferromagnetic ores while sneaking with a magnetized pickaxe.
Ticks between ore-rip pulses. One block per pulse (capped to prevent griefing).
magnetization.configuration.tools.axePul: Chopping a log with a magnetized axe sends a brief radial pull on nearby ferromagnetic items + entities toward the player.
magnetization.configuration.tools.shovel: Digging dirt/sand/gravel/clay/soil with a magnetized shovel may drop trace iron nuggets and rarer raw magnetite.
Probability per shovel-target block break that a trace metal drops.
magnetization.configuration.tools.hoeDow: Right-clicking with a magnetized hoe pings ferromagnetic ore blocks in range with marker particles.
Block radius scanned by the hoe dowsing ping.
magnetization.configuration.debug.toolti: Diagnostic logging toggles. Off by default — only useful when investigating emitter or anchor behavior.
magnetization.configuration.debug.debugL: Master toggle for FieldApplicator + anchor-binding debug logs. Leave off on busy servers; spammy at default.
magnetization.configuration.commands.too: Required permission level for each /magnetization command group. 0 = any player, 2 = operator (vanilla default), 3-4 = higher op tiers. Read live so /reload picks up edits.
magnetization.configuration.commands.deb: Permission level required to run /magnetization debug field|forceAt.
magnetization.configuration.commands.spa: Permission level required to run /magnetization spawn_test_ship|spawn_test_anchor.
magnetization.configuration.commands.shi: /magnetization clear_phantoms / shatter_all_ships / push_nearest_ship — Required Op Level
Permission level for ship-management utilities. These mutate world state (destroy sub-levels), so the default is operator-only.
magnetization.configuration.commands.lir: Permission level required to run the /magnetization lirm group. Includes lightning summoning; keep op-gated on shared servers.
magnetization.configuration.commands.tpP: Permission level required to run /magnetization tp anomaly|petrified_forest. Biome travel is quality-of-life rather than destructive, so 0 (any player) is the default.
compass.magnetization.anomaly_empty: Compass spinning wildly — anomalous field flux.
lirm.magnetization.struck: Lightning Induced Remnant Magnetism — gear polarised %s.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.swo: Magnetized: hits yank opposite-pole armored targets toward you.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.pic: Magnetized: sneak to slowly rip nearby ferromagnetic ore out of the world.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.axe: Magnetized: chopping a log pulls nearby ferromagnetic drops toward you.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.sho: Magnetized: chance to pan trace iron / raw magnetite from loose earth.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.hoe: Magnetized: sneak + right-click to dowse for ferromagnetic ore in range.
gui.magnetization.redstone_fuel_slot: Redstone power. Any redstone dust here keeps the emitter active — no external signal required.
gui.magnetization.tool_slot: Enchanted tool or book. Its enchantments (Fortune, Silk Touch, etc.) apply to drops the emitter pulls in.
gui.magnetization.armor_slot: Armor or metal tool to magnetize. The polarity buttons stamp this item with a pole.
tooltip.magnetization.electromagnet.use: Powered by redstone. Pulls nearby ships and ferromagnetic items.
tooltip.magnetization.kinetic_electromag: Powered by Create rotation. Strength scales with RPM.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_anchor.us: Locks the first ship that enters its range. Persists across reload.
tooltip.magnetization.repulsor_coil.use: Pushes ships outward in a 45° cone along its facing. Place upward for a hover pad; place sideways or down to line a propulsion tunnel.
tooltip.magnetization.tractor_beam.use: Directional pull along facing. Wrench to rotate.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_excavator: Powered by redstone (external signal or internal redstone slot). Projects a widening cone along its facing and continuously pulls every ferromagnetic block in range — each pulled block tunnels through obstructions toward the emitter, drops on arrival, and feeds adjacent inventories. Wrench to rotate; right-click for the GUI.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_plate.use: Flat ferromagnetic plate. Used as cladding.
tooltip.magnetization.field_compass.use: Right-click for the strongest field. Sneak right-click lists every active field in range.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_grapple.u: Right-click to launch toward the nearest attractive emitter (24-block range). Sneak mid-flight to cancel.
jei.magnetization.ferromagnetic.info: Items in this list are pulled by Magnetization emitters when dropped on the ground. Other mods can extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic tag.
jei.magnetization.ferromagnetic_blocks.i: Blocks in this list are ripped out of the ground by the Magnetic Excavator. Anything in their path gets pulled along too. Other mods extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic_blocks tag.
rei.magnetization.ferromagnetic.name: Ferromagnetic items
rei.magnetization.ferromagnetic.info: Items in this list are pulled by Magnetization emitters when dropped on the ground. Other mods can extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic tag.
rei.magnetization.ferromagnetic_blocks.i: Blocks in this list are ripped out of the ground by the Magnetic Excavator. Anything in their path gets pulled along too. Other mods extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic_blocks tag.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_switch.us: Emits a redstone signal proportional to nearest ship's distance (8-block range).
tooltip.magnetization.permanent_magnet.u: Always-on weak field. Right-click flips polarity. Build propulsion tracks by lining up opposing magnets between world and ship.
tooltip.magnetization.temporary_magnet.u: Cheap, decaying counterpart. Emits a weak field for 10 minutes after placement, then reverts to an Iron Block (redstone consumed at craft is not returned). Use for short-lived propulsion segments.
Place adjacent to an emitter to flip its field polarity. Two inverters cancel.
tooltip.magnetization.raw_magnetite.use: Mined from magnetite ore. Smelt for an ingot.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetite_ore.use: Drops raw magnetite. Fortune multiplies the drop.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetite_block.us: Compact storage for magnetite ingots. Ferromagnetic in bulk.
advancement.magnetization.root.title: Magnetic North
advancement.magnetization.root.descripti: Craft a Lodestone Core — the heart of every emitter.
advancement.magnetization.full_kit.title: Aeromagnetic Engineer
advancement.magnetization.full_kit.descr: Hold every emitter in the addon at once.
advancement.magnetization.find_magnetite: Mine raw magnetite (Fe₃O₄) from a magnetite ore.
advancement.magnetization.smelt_magnetit: Smelt raw magnetite into a magnetite ingot.
advancement.magnetization.full_loadout.d: Hold a magnetite and ferromagnetic sword and pickaxe.
advancement.magnetization.dual_magnetize: Equip any metal armor piece tracked by Magnetization.
advancement.magnetization.vein_whisperer: Hold a Magnetic Excavator. Mining without lifting a finger.
advancement.magnetization.inverted_quarr: Place a Magnetic Excavator. Wrench it to face wherever the ore is.
